catalog.reason: A workflow-watched dist skill path changed to expose shared-skill-library-governance under dist/skills, but the scheduler could not observe or wait for the resulting workflow commit in the same connector pass.
catalog.action: Verify whether Catalog Refresh regenerated dist/catalog.json, dist/catalog.md, and dist/install-manifest.json. Expected counts: 1176 skills, 99 agent-operations entries, and 412 medium-risk entries. If not, run npm run build:catalog in a checkout or CI-capable surface and commit the generated surfaces.
catalog.resolution: Ran npm run build:catalog in local checkout. Regenerated dist/catalog.json, dist/catalog.md, dist/install-manifest.json. Counts now 1182 skills (1176 expected + 6 new agent-operations skills added this session: authoring-agent-skills, engineering-loop-contracts, engineering-agent-harnesses, engineering-context-windows, evaluating-skills-before-authoring, gating-work-with-verification-loops). shared-skill-library-governance present in catalog. agent-operations now 105.

critic.reason: Catalog shows 587 uncategorized-domain and 759 unspecified-risk skills; the new Quality Gate in operations/aggregator-loop.md forbids new entries without domain/risk_level and names this backlog standing maintenance material.
critic.action: Batch metadata backfill: assign domain and risk_level frontmatter in batches (e.g. 50/run) using classify_dist_skills.py plus review; prioritize over new discovery while counts grow.
